mapper.select:
SELECT m.`code`, m.`name`, m.entry_date, m.exit_date, m.email, m.tel, sm.`name` AS std_major_name, s.`status` AS std_status, pm.`name` AS prof_major_name, p.`status` AS prof_status, a.`status` AS stf_status FROM `member` m
LEFT JOIN `student` s ON m.member_id = s.member_id LEFT JOIN `major` sm ON s.major_id = sm.major_id
LEFT JOIN `professor` p ON m.member_id = p.member_id LEFT JOIN `major` pm ON p.major_id = pm.major_id
LEFT JOIN `staff` a ON m.member_id = a.member_id
m.role = #{role}
AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{memberName}, '%')
AND (sm.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{majorName}, '%') OR pm.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{majorName}, '%'))
ORDER BY m.member_id DESC
LIMIT #{startIdx}, #{size}
